# handlers

```go
import "gesitr/internal/user/workout/handlers"
```

Package handlers implements the HTTP handlers for user workout management.

### Overview

A workout is a user\-owned template that organizes exercises into sections. The hierarchy is: Workout → Sections → Section Exercises. Each section exercise references an exercise scheme from [gesitr/internal/exercise/handlers](<https://pkg.go.dev/gesitr/internal/exercise/handlers/>) \(which defines sets, reps, and rest\).

All endpoints are scoped to the authenticated user — there is no public visibility for workouts.

### Workouts

[ListWorkouts](<#ListWorkouts>) returns only workouts owned by the current user. [CreateWorkout](<#CreateWorkout>) creates a new empty workout — add sections and exercises via the section and section\-exercise endpoints below. [GetWorkout](<#GetWorkout>) returns the full workout tree \(sections and their exercises\). [UpdateWorkout](<#UpdateWorkout>) and [DeleteWorkout](<#DeleteWorkout>) require ownership.

### Sections

A section belongs to a workout and groups exercises \(e.g. "Warm\-up", "Main Sets", "Superset A"\). Sections are ordered by position. [CreateWorkoutSection](<#CreateWorkoutSection>) requires a valid workoutId owned by the current user. [ListWorkoutSections](<#ListWorkoutSections>) can be filtered by workoutId.

### Section Exercises

A section exercise links an exercise scheme to a section. The exercise scheme is created via [gesitr/internal/exercise/handlers.CreateExerciseScheme](<https://pkg.go.dev/gesitr/internal/exercise/handlers/#CreateExerciseScheme>) and defines which exercise to perform and how \(sets, reps, rest\). [CreateWorkoutSectionExercise](<#CreateWorkoutSectionExercise>) requires a valid workoutSectionId whose parent workout is owned by the current user, and a valid exerciseSchemeId.

### Permissions

Workouts do not have a dedicated /permissions endpoint. Instead, all endpoints enforce ownership directly:

- List endpoints filter by the current user's ID
- All other endpoints check entity ownership and return 403 for non\-owners

<a name="CreateWorkout"></a>
## func [CreateWorkout](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/workout_handlers.go#L44>)

```go
func CreateWorkout(c *gin.Context)
```

CreateWorkout creates an empty workout. Add sections via [CreateWorkoutSection](<#CreateWorkoutSection>) and exercises via [CreateWorkoutSectionExercise](<#CreateWorkoutSectionExercise>). POST /api/user/workouts

<details><summary>Example</summary>
<p>

CreateWorkout creates an empty workout. The owner is set from the authenticated user. Add sections via [CreateWorkoutSection](<#CreateWorkoutSection>).

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

w := doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{
	"name": "Push Day",
	"notes": "Chest, shoulders, triceps"
}`)

var workout models.Workout
json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &workout)
fmt.Println(w.Code)
fmt.Println(workout.Name)
fmt.Println(workout.Owner)
fmt.Println(*workout.Notes)
// Output:
// 201
// Push Day
// alice
// Chest, shoulders, triceps
```

#### Output

```
201
Push Day
alice
Chest, shoulders, triceps
```

</p>
</details>

<a name="CreateWorkoutSection"></a>
## func [CreateWorkoutSection](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/section_handlers.go#L57>)

```go
func CreateWorkoutSection(c *gin.Context)
```

CreateWorkoutSection adds a section to a workout. Requires a workoutId referencing a workout owned by the current user. A workout must exist before sections can be added — see [CreateWorkout](<#CreateWorkout>). POST /api/user/workout\-sections

<details><summary>Example</summary>
<p>

Creating a section requires a workout. The workout must be created first via [CreateWorkout](<#CreateWorkout>).

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

// Create a workout first.
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)

// Add a section to it.
w := doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-sections", `{
	"workoutId": 1,
	"type": "main",
	"label": "Compound Lifts",
	"position": 0,
	"restBetweenExercises": 120
}`)

var section models.WorkoutSection
json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &section)
fmt.Println(w.Code)
fmt.Println(section.Type)
fmt.Println(*section.Label)
fmt.Println(section.WorkoutID)
// Output:
// 201
// main
// Compound Lifts
// 1
```

#### Output

```
201
main
Compound Lifts
1
```

</p>
</details>

<details><summary>Example (Non Owner Denied)</summary>
<p>

Non\-owner cannot add a section to another user's workout.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)

w := doRawAs(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-sections", `{
	"workoutId": 1,
	"type": "main",
	"position": 0
}`, "bob")
fmt.Println(w.Code)
// Output: 403
```

#### Output

```
403
```

</p>
</details>

<a name="CreateWorkoutSectionExercise"></a>
## func [CreateWorkoutSectionExercise](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/section_exercise_handlers.go#L56>)

```go
func CreateWorkoutSectionExercise(c *gin.Context)
```

CreateWorkoutSectionExercise adds an exercise to a section. Requires a workoutSectionId \(whose parent workout must be owned by the current user\) and an exerciseSchemeId referencing an existing exercise scheme — see [gesitr/internal/exercise/handlers.CreateExerciseScheme](<https://pkg.go.dev/gesitr/internal/exercise/handlers/#CreateExerciseScheme>). A workout and section must exist first — see [CreateWorkout](<#CreateWorkout>) and [CreateWorkoutSection](<#CreateWorkoutSection>). POST /api/user/workout\-section\-exercises

<details><summary>Example</summary>
<p>

Creating a section exercise requires a workout, a section, and an exercise scheme. The full hierarchy: Workout → Section → SectionExercise → ExerciseScheme.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

// Create the exercise and scheme first.
createExerciseSchemeForExample(r)

// Create a workout and section.
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-sections", `{
	"workoutId": 1, "type": "main", "position": 0
}`)

// Add the exercise scheme to the section.
w := doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-section-exercises", `{
	"workoutSectionId": 1,
	"exerciseSchemeId": 1,
	"position": 0
}`)

var se models.WorkoutSectionExercise
json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &se)
fmt.Println(w.Code)
fmt.Println(se.WorkoutSectionID)
fmt.Println(se.ExerciseSchemeID)
// Output:
// 201
// 1
// 1
```

#### Output

```
201
1
1
```

</p>
</details>

<details><summary>Example (Non Owner Denied)</summary>
<p>

Non\-owner cannot add exercises to another user's section.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

createExerciseSchemeForExample(r)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-sections", `{
	"workoutId": 1, "type": "main", "position": 0
}`)

w := doRawAs(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-section-exercises", `{
	"workoutSectionId": 1,
	"exerciseSchemeId": 1,
	"position": 0
}`, "bob")
fmt.Println(w.Code)
// Output: 403
```

#### Output

```
403
```

</p>
</details>

<a name="DeleteWorkout"></a>
## func [DeleteWorkout](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/workout_handlers.go#L111>)

```go
func DeleteWorkout(c *gin.Context)
```

DeleteWorkout deletes a workout. DELETE /api/user/workouts/:id

<details><summary>Example (Non Owner Denied)</summary>
<p>

Non\-owner cannot delete another user's workout.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)

w := doRawAs(r, "DELETE", "/api/user/workouts/1", "", "bob")
fmt.Println(w.Code)
// Output: 403
```

#### Output

```
403
```

</p>
</details>

<details><summary>Example (Owner)</summary>
<p>

Owner can delete their workout.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)

w := doJSON(r, "DELETE", "/api/user/workouts/1", nil)
fmt.Println(w.Code)

// Workout is gone.
wg := doJSON(r, "GET", "/api/user/workouts/1", nil)
fmt.Println(wg.Code)
// Output:
// 204
// 404
```

#### Output

```
204
404
```

</p>
</details>

<a name="DeleteWorkoutSection"></a>
## func [DeleteWorkoutSection](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/section_handlers.go#L92>)

```go
func DeleteWorkoutSection(c *gin.Context)
```

DeleteWorkoutSection removes a section from its workout. DELETE /api/user/workout\-sections/:id

<details><summary>Example (Non Owner Denied)</summary>
<p>

Non\-owner cannot delete another user's section.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-sections", `{
	"workoutId": 1, "type": "main", "position": 0
}`)

w := doRawAs(r, "DELETE", "/api/user/workout-sections/1", "", "bob")
fmt.Println(w.Code)
// Output: 403
```

#### Output

```
403
```

</p>
</details>

<details><summary>Example (Owner)</summary>
<p>

Owner can delete a section from their workout.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-sections", `{
	"workoutId": 1, "type": "main", "position": 0
}`)

w := doJSON(r, "DELETE", "/api/user/workout-sections/1", nil)
fmt.Println(w.Code)

wg := doJSON(r, "GET", "/api/user/workout-sections/1", nil)
fmt.Println(wg.Code)
// Output:
// 204
// 404
```

#### Output

```
204
404
```

</p>
</details>

<a name="DeleteWorkoutSectionExercise"></a>
## func [DeleteWorkoutSectionExercise](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/section_exercise_handlers.go#L83>)

```go
func DeleteWorkoutSectionExercise(c *gin.Context)
```

DeleteWorkoutSectionExercise removes an exercise from a section. DELETE /api/user/workout\-section\-exercises/:id

<details><summary>Example (Non Owner Denied)</summary>
<p>

Non\-owner cannot delete exercises from another user's section.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

createExerciseSchemeForExample(r)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-sections", `{
	"workoutId": 1, "type": "main", "position": 0
}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-section-exercises", `{
	"workoutSectionId": 1, "exerciseSchemeId": 1, "position": 0
}`)

w := doRawAs(r, "DELETE", "/api/user/workout-section-exercises/1", "", "bob")
fmt.Println(w.Code)
// Output: 403
```

#### Output

```
403
```

</p>
</details>

<details><summary>Example (Owner)</summary>
<p>

Owner can delete an exercise from their section.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

createExerciseSchemeForExample(r)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-sections", `{
	"workoutId": 1, "type": "main", "position": 0
}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-section-exercises", `{
	"workoutSectionId": 1, "exerciseSchemeId": 1, "position": 0
}`)

w := doJSON(r, "DELETE", "/api/user/workout-section-exercises/1", nil)
fmt.Println(w.Code)

// Section exercise is gone.
wl := doRaw(r, "GET", "/api/user/workout-section-exercises?workoutSectionId=1", "")
var exercises []models.WorkoutSectionExercise
json.Unmarshal(wl.Body.Bytes(), &exercises)
fmt.Println(len(exercises))
// Output:
// 204
// 0
```

#### Output

```
204
0
```

</p>
</details>

<a name="GetWorkout"></a>
## func [GetWorkout](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/workout_handlers.go#L62>)

```go
func GetWorkout(c *gin.Context)
```

GetWorkout returns a workout with its full section and exercise tree. Returns 403 if the caller is not the owner. GET /api/user/workouts/:id

<details><summary>Example (Full Hierarchy)</summary>
<p>

Full hierarchy: create a workout with sections and exercises, then retrieve the complete tree via GetWorkout.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

// Create exercise and scheme.
createExerciseSchemeForExample(r)

// Build the workout hierarchy.
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-sections", `{
	"workoutId": 1, "type": "main", "label": "Compound", "position": 0
}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-section-exercises", `{
	"workoutSectionId": 1, "exerciseSchemeId": 1, "position": 0
}`)

// GetWorkout returns the full tree.
w := doJSON(r, "GET", "/api/user/workouts/1", nil)

var workout models.Workout
json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &workout)
fmt.Println(w.Code)
fmt.Println(workout.Name)
fmt.Println(len(workout.Sections), "section(s)")
fmt.Println(*workout.Sections[0].Label)
fmt.Println(len(workout.Sections[0].Exercises), "exercise(s)")
fmt.Println(workout.Sections[0].Exercises[0].ExerciseSchemeID)
// Output:
// 200
// Push Day
// 1 section(s)
// Compound
// 1 exercise(s)
// 1
```

#### Output

```
200
Push Day
1 section(s)
Compound
1 exercise(s)
1
```

</p>
</details>

<details><summary>Example (Non Owner Denied)</summary>
<p>

Non\-owner is denied access to another user's workout with 403 Forbidden.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)

w := doRawAs(r, "GET", "/api/user/workouts/1", "", "bob")
fmt.Println(w.Code)
// Output: 403
```

#### Output

```
403
```

</p>
</details>

<details><summary>Example (Owner Access)</summary>
<p>

Owner can retrieve their own workout with full section and exercise tree.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)

w := doJSON(r, "GET", "/api/user/workouts/1", nil)

var workout models.Workout
json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &workout)
fmt.Println(w.Code)
fmt.Println(workout.Name)
fmt.Println(workout.Owner)
// Output:
// 200
// Push Day
// alice
```

#### Output

```
200
Push Day
alice
```

</p>
</details>

<a name="GetWorkoutSection"></a>
## func [GetWorkoutSection](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/section_handlers.go#L78>)

```go
func GetWorkoutSection(c *gin.Context)
```

GetWorkoutSection returns a single section with its exercises. GET /api/user/workout\-sections/:id

<details><summary>Example (Non Owner Denied)</summary>
<p>

Non\-owner cannot access another user's section.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-sections", `{
	"workoutId": 1, "type": "main", "position": 0
}`)

w := doRawAs(r, "GET", "/api/user/workout-sections/1", "", "bob")
fmt.Println(w.Code)
// Output: 403
```

#### Output

```
403
```

</p>
</details>

<details><summary>Example (Owner)</summary>
<p>

Owner can retrieve a single section with its exercises.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-sections", `{
	"workoutId": 1, "type": "main", "label": "Compound", "position": 0
}`)

w := doJSON(r, "GET", "/api/user/workout-sections/1", nil)

var section models.WorkoutSection
json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &section)
fmt.Println(w.Code)
fmt.Println(section.Type)
// Output:
// 200
// main
```

#### Output

```
200
main
```

</p>
</details>

<a name="ListWorkoutSectionExercises"></a>
## func [ListWorkoutSectionExercises](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/section_exercise_handlers.go#L27>)

```go
func ListWorkoutSectionExercises(c *gin.Context)
```

ListWorkoutSectionExercises returns section exercises owned by the current user. Filter by workoutSectionId query param. GET /api/user/workout\-section\-exercises

<details><summary>Example (Non Owner)</summary>
<p>

Non\-owner sees an empty list for another user's section exercises.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

createExerciseSchemeForExample(r)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-sections", `{
	"workoutId": 1, "type": "main", "position": 0
}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-section-exercises", `{
	"workoutSectionId": 1, "exerciseSchemeId": 1, "position": 0
}`)

w := doRawAs(r, "GET", "/api/user/workout-section-exercises?workoutSectionId=1", "", "bob")

var exercises []models.WorkoutSectionExercise
json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &exercises)
fmt.Println(w.Code)
fmt.Println(len(exercises))
// Output:
// 200
// 0
```

#### Output

```
200
0
```

</p>
</details>

<details><summary>Example (Owner)</summary>
<p>

ListWorkoutSectionExercises returns exercises in sections owned by the current user. Filter by workoutSectionId.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

createExerciseSchemeForExample(r)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-sections", `{
	"workoutId": 1, "type": "main", "position": 0
}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-section-exercises", `{
	"workoutSectionId": 1, "exerciseSchemeId": 1, "position": 0
}`)

w := doRaw(r, "GET", "/api/user/workout-section-exercises?workoutSectionId=1", "")

var exercises []models.WorkoutSectionExercise
json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &exercises)
fmt.Println(w.Code)
fmt.Println(len(exercises))
fmt.Println(exercises[0].ExerciseSchemeID)
// Output:
// 200
// 1
// 1
```

#### Output

```
200
1
1
```

</p>
</details>

<a name="ListWorkoutSections"></a>
## func [ListWorkoutSections](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/section_handlers.go#L30>)

```go
func ListWorkoutSections(c *gin.Context)
```

ListWorkoutSections returns sections owned by the current user. Filter by workoutId query param to get sections for a specific workout. GET /api/user/workout\-sections

<details><summary>Example (Non Owner)</summary>
<p>

Non\-owner sees an empty list for another user's sections.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-sections", `{
	"workoutId": 1, "type": "main", "position": 0
}`)

w := doRawAs(r, "GET", "/api/user/workout-sections?workoutId=1", "", "bob")

var sections []models.WorkoutSection
json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &sections)
fmt.Println(w.Code)
fmt.Println(len(sections))
// Output:
// 200
// 0
```

#### Output

```
200
0
```

</p>
</details>

<details><summary>Example (Owner)</summary>
<p>

ListWorkoutSections returns sections owned by the current user. Filter by workoutId to get sections for a specific workout.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-sections", `{
	"workoutId": 1, "type": "main", "label": "Compound", "position": 0
}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-sections", `{
	"workoutId": 1, "type": "supplementary", "label": "Isolation", "position": 1
}`)

w := doRaw(r, "GET", "/api/user/workout-sections?workoutId=1", "")

var sections []models.WorkoutSection
json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &sections)
fmt.Println(w.Code)
fmt.Println(len(sections))
fmt.Println(*sections[0].Label)
fmt.Println(*sections[1].Label)
// Output:
// 200
// 2
// Compound
// Isolation
```

#### Output

```
200
2
Compound
Isolation
```

</p>
</details>

<a name="ListWorkouts"></a>
## func [ListWorkouts](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/workout_handlers.go#L24>)

```go
func ListWorkouts(c *gin.Context)
```

ListWorkouts returns all workouts owned by the current user, each including its sections and section exercises. GET /api/user/workouts

<details><summary>Example (Non Owner)</summary>
<p>

Non\-owner sees an empty list — workouts are always private.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)

w := doRawAs(r, "GET", "/api/user/workouts", "", "bob")

var workouts []models.Workout
json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &workouts)
fmt.Println(w.Code)
fmt.Println(len(workouts))
// Output:
// 200
// 0
```

#### Output

```
200
0
```

</p>
</details>

<details><summary>Example (Owner)</summary>
<p>

ListWorkouts returns only the current user's workouts.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Pull Day"}`)

w := doJSON(r, "GET", "/api/user/workouts", nil)

var workouts []models.Workout
json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &workouts)
fmt.Println(w.Code)
fmt.Println(len(workouts))
fmt.Println(workouts[0].Name)
fmt.Println(workouts[1].Name)
// Output:
// 200
// 2
// Push Day
// Pull Day
```

#### Output

```
200
2
Push Day
Pull Day
```

</p>
</details>

<a name="RegisterRoutes"></a>
## func [RegisterRoutes](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/routes.go#L10>)

```go
func RegisterRoutes(api huma.API)
```

RegisterRoutes registers all workout, section, and section\-exercise endpoints on the huma API.

<a name="UpdateWorkout"></a>
## func [UpdateWorkout](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/workout_handlers.go#L77>)

```go
func UpdateWorkout(c *gin.Context)
```

UpdateWorkout updates workout metadata \(name, notes\). Sections and exercises are managed via their own endpoints. PUT /api/user/workouts/:id

<details><summary>Example (Non Owner Denied)</summary>
<p>

Non\-owner cannot update another user's workout.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)

w := doRawAs(r, "PUT", "/api/user/workouts/1", `{"name": "Stolen"}`, "bob")
fmt.Println(w.Code)
// Output: 403
```

#### Output

```
403
```

</p>
</details>

<details><summary>Example (Owner)</summary>
<p>

Owner can update workout metadata \(name, notes\).

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)

w := doRaw(r, "PUT", "/api/user/workouts/1", `{
	"name": "Upper Body Push",
	"notes": "Updated focus"
}`)

var workout models.Workout
json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &workout)
fmt.Println(w.Code)
fmt.Println(workout.Name)
// Output:
// 200
// Upper Body Push
```

#### Output

```
200
Upper Body Push
```

</p>
</details>
